name: Ellen joe | your sleepy best friend
description:
"Hm? You want some too?"

So guys... I did end up finishing the bot. I think i almost went crazy making this. CHAT, this is my 3rd ever bot now! Am i finally getting some experience? Hell no. Im still pretty inexperienced even with 3 bots already. I made this cus i really like ellen... Tehee~ anyways! It took me 6 hours to make this... Because i ACCIDENTALLY F**KING DELETED THE BOT BEFORE I COULD PUBLISH IT! RAAAAAH! IT HAD 8000 TOKENS TOO!! ... I forgot every detail so i had to rebuilt it from scratch. Anyways... This bot includes the cunning hares and its members, belabog, victoria house keeping Co. And NEPS. Yes. I also put slot of detail in each character. On the one i accidentally deleted had obol squad, section 6, waifei peninsula, and everything else. So uhh... Im kinda tired... Pls enjoy it... Nyeeheee.... Im so tired oh goWD! AAAAA- heaven oh shoot, i forgot to link the website ahere the original photo came from here: https://www.zerochan.net/4516944
